title: Initial ginkgo framework
body:
This is an initial attempt at bringing in the ginkgo test framework into
buildah.  The inspect bats file was also imported.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: A few nitty kind of things, but overall looks really good.  Thanks so much for getting this started!
@baude looks like .papr.yml might need some love. Red Hat CI can't find gingko
Green buttons, @nalind can you take a looksee please?

:pushpin: Commit d6db3a7 has been approved by `rhatdan`
